caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 19 kt winds with 4.4 ft wave heights and a 75% rain probability, while St. Lucia has 10 kt winds with less than 10% rain probability, making St. Maarten the top impact port in the Eastern Caribbean today. I expect these conditions to persist with the dominant swell direction coming from the ESE at a 7 s period.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 21 kt and wave heights of 7.5 ft, while Lisbon is seeing less severe conditions with max winds of 15 kt. I expect the strong winds and high waves in Cadiz to impact port operations, with the dominant swell direction coming from the west.
